! Minimal air QMEAS test without HCC

TITLE
	QMEAS Air Simple Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (12/25) 1/1-1/1 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/1 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	Hor ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall RC-150 GPB-12 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom Vol=100.0 *s alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 20.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	FAN testfan Go=100.0 ;
*

SYSCMP
	SupplyFan -c testfan ;
	AirMeter -type QMEAS ;
*

SYSPTH
	AirPath -sys A -f A
		> (0.05) _OA AirMeter[C] SupplyFan AirMeter[H] AirMeter[G] TestRoom > ;
*

CONTL
*
*
